past_due_banner.title: Payment failed — action required
past_due_banner.body: We tried to charge your card on file multiple times and it didn't go through. Update your payment method now to keep your servers running. You have 14 days before the subscription is deactivated.

billing.page_description: Manage your payment method, renew the subscription, or fix a stuck payment.
billing.footer_help: Need to swap cards or fix a stuck payment? Open the Paystack flow.
billing.success_updated: Payment method updated successfully — your subscription is active.
billing.no_subscription_body: You don't have an active SlimDeploy subscription. Subscribe from the SlimDeploy dashboard to manage billing here.
